titleStmt.title: SII 24.439: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 439. (A.R. No. 91 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, CHANDANA-MAṆḌAPA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers gift of land in Maṇattalpāḍi by Śrīraṅgappa-Nāyaka, son of Tuḷuva Veṅgaḷa-Nāyaka and (administrator) of Madura-araśar-Paḍaivīḍu, for providing offerings to the god during the services instituted in the names of the king Achyutarāya-Mahārāya, queen Varadāmbikā and prince Veṅkaṭādri. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1460, Viḷambi, Kuṁbha, śu. 12, Friday, Punarpūśam regularly correspond to 1539, A.D. January 31, Friday; ·29; ·65.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śuhamastu . śrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvira Accitarāya mahārāyaraprathuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāṉiṉṟa śakāptam 1000 4 100 6 10 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa viḷampi samvatsara tumbha
nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu dvādaśiyum śukravāramum peṟṟa puṉar pūcanakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭiya kulācanivaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟā vitivaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati śrīraṅganāthadevar śrī paṇṭārattukku cuvāmi Accuta rāya mahārāyar
pādacervai paṇṇum matura Aracar paṭaiviṭṭu tuḷuva veṅkaḷanāyakkar makaṉ ciraṅkappanāyakkar teṇṭaṉ samarppittu poliyūṭṭu cilācāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . Iṟṟaināḷ cuvāmi Accutarāyar mahārāyaravarkaḷukkum Ammaṉ varata(r)ācci Ammaṉ Avarkaḷu
kkum cikka veṅkaṭātrirāyaṟkum dharmmam Uṇṭākaveṇum Eṉṟu nāḷ toṟum Iravum pakal celvar Avasaram Iraṇṭukku Avasaram Oṉṟukku campāttaḷikai Iraṇṭu Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku perumāḷ Amutu ceyta (a)ruḷum taḷikai 4kku taḷikai Oṉṟukku tiruvaraṅka
tevaṉāl Amutupaṭi patakku Āka Amutupaṭi §1000ø taḷikai Oṉṟukku ney Amutu n=ta Āka ney Amutu § paruppu Amutu § kompil Añcu koṭiyil Añcu kaṟiyamutum teṅkāyamutu 4 paḻam Amutu 8 vellam Amutu palam 4 Uppu Amutu miḷaku Amutu pala campāravakai
vilaikkum Erikarumpu vilaikkum Uḷppaṭa campāttaḷikai 1 kku ø1 Āka taḷikai 4 kku pucu Āka varuṣam 1- kku nāḷ 3 100 6 10 5- kku� 1000 4 100 6 10- kku poliyūṭṭāka mutaliṭṭa poṉ 5 100- kku vaṭṭi ø100kku ø2(1/2)- Āka varuṣam1- kku māsam 10 2- kku vaṭṭikku kūṭiṉa (poṉ)
poṉ [100 5 10] Itil taḷikai Amutu ceyyum vakaikku kūṭiṉa poṉ 100 4 10 6m nikki poṉ 4 kku tiruvaraṅkac celvar nāḷtorum Amutuceytaru nāḷ 1kku Iḷaṉir 10 2 Āka varuṣam 1- kku nāḷ 3 100 6 10 5- kku Iḷanir 4 1000 3 100 8 10- kku paṇam 1- kku Iḷanir 100 10 vilaikku poṉ 4
Āka poliyūṭṭāka mutaliṭṭa poṉ 5 100- kku vaṭṭiyil kūṭiṉa poṉ 100 5 10 Inta poṉ nūttu Aṉpatum koṇṭen nāḷtoṟum campāttaḷikainālum Iḷanīr paṉṉiraṇṭum perumāḷum tiruvaraṅkaccelvarum candrātityavarai
yum Amutu ceytaruḷina pattikkaṭṭaḷaikku Aṟṟa viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu nālattoṉṟukku campāt taḷikai Oṉṟu Iḷanir muṉṟu piracātamum śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷ Amutu ceyyum paṭikku ciraṅkaṉār karttar Irāmāṉuṣa kūṭattu kku can=tāṉa
paramparai Āka cantrātityavaraiyum naṭantuvarakkaṭavatākavum Ituvum teṟppakuḷam poṉa vaḻikku vakaikku meṟku śrīviṣṇutittam vaṭakaraikku vaḻi 1 m vaṭakku Irāma mutta(ā)raiyaṉ kaiyil tiruvu
ṭaiyāṉ koṇṭu Uṭaiyatāṉa kku kiḻakku maṇikka teṟku Iṉṉāṅkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa maṇattalpāṭi cūrappar pa kaiyilum nāṉ koṇṭu Uṭaiya tā toppukku teṟppakkuḷa Āṟāntirunāḷaikku Eḻuntaruḷi A
mutu ceytaruḷum campā taḷikai 4- kku poṉ 4 cemattaḷikai 2 kku pu 4 mutu kku pu 2 I Atirasa 2 100 vaṭai 2 100 kku pu 6 tocai 2 100- kku pu 6 veccamutu kūṉ 4 10- kku kūṉ 1 kku pu 1 Āka poṉ 4 5 10- kku pu 2 cāttuppaṭikku pu 4
celavaḻikka cantaṉam paṭi 2 10kku pu2 tirukkuttumaṇi viḷakku ttu kku poṉ 4 perumāḷukku pariviṭṭavilai pu- 2 nācciyār parikalattukku kha Upaiyappaṭi ciraṅka
cu parivaṭṭamdamaged. poliyūṭṭu cantrādityava
Digital edition of SII 24.439 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
